subcodes.first_line: O true friend! Thy detailed letter was perused. The enmity, corruption and persecution of the oppressors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار حقیقی نامه مفصل شما ملاحظه گردید عناد و فساد و اضطهاد اهل جفا در
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @justice and wrath of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @wisdom [hikmat], @poems and quotation from poetry
